title: Strucmotif Query File Parameters

data.description: File content converted to a Base64 string

residue_ids.description: Provides the set of residue identifiers that defines the query. Can be undefined if the submitted file property contains an extracted motif.

description: Upload Base64-encoded file in one of the following formats: cif, bcif. Deprecation notice: Not used and scheduled for removal with the next major version. Use `url` instead to provide custom data to the API.
